units.name: Hawk
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Bastion
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Cloak immediately on turn 1. Move toward the enemy medic or weakest target. Use shadow_strike when adjacent while cloaked. Use breach to sabotage high-value targets.

units.name: Watcher
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Hawk
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Snare
units.prompt: Trap the paths enemies must take to reach your backline. Stay at medium range. Use pulse on clustered enemies. Denial blocks adjacent threats.

actions.thinking: Enemy Hawk is at dist=4, exactly at scan range from current position. But 'Enemies In Range' shows no enemies in range from (2,5). The range check says Hawk dist=4 but inRange=false. I need to move closer to get Hawk in scan range. Moving to (2,4) reduces dist to 3 for Hawk, putting it in range. Then I can scan Hawk to reveal their strategy and deal 1 damage.
Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders. Then move north toward enemies. Watcher(oracle) is high value target. Move to (0,3) to close distance while cloaked.

Enemies are far away (dist 5-6). I should move south to intercept their approach path and place a trap on a likely corridor tile. Moving to (4,2) puts me closer to center while staying at medium range. Placing a trap at (3,2) covers the likely approach path between the two enemies.

Both enemies are out of range (dist 4-5, my range is 2). I need to close distance to get Hawk in range. Moving to (1,2) gets me closer while keeping some distance. From there Hawk at (2,1) would be dist 2 — in range for precision_shot. I haven't moved yet so precision_shot deals full 2dmg.

No enemies adjacent. Advance north toward nearest enemy Hawk at (1,2). Best move is (2,2) to close distance. Enemies are mostly north, so shield_wall facing N protects allied Hawk at (2,1) who is wounded.

I'm at (2,1) with only 1HP — critically low. Hawk(striker) is adjacent at dist=2, which is my precision_shot range. I have not moved yet, so precision_shot does full 2dmg. Hawk is the immediate threat at dist=2. Snare(vector) is at dist=3 — safe from adjacency denial. Orders say prioritize damage dealers after medics (no medics present), so Hawk is the target. After shooting, I should reposition away from Hawk to avoid being finished off. Move to (3,1) puts me further from Hawk at (1,2) while staying away from Snare at (4,2). Actually (3,2) keeps range on Hawk. Let me shoot first, then move to (3,1) to increase distance from Hawk.
Cloak expires after this turn. Hawk is wounded and I can reach (1,3) which is behind them. Move to (1,3) then shadow_strike Hawk to deal damage while staying cloaked.

Shade (specter) is highest priority — unknown prompt, adjacent threat at dist=2. Scan Shade to reveal strategy and deal 1dmg. Then recalibrate Snare (our damage dealer/vector at 4,2) to boost trap effectiveness. Bastion is already shielding toward (2,1) so less urgent. Stay at (2,4) — no enemy vectors adjacent so scan is unblocked.

secondAction.addendum: Hawk at (3,1) is wounded and uses precision_shot on high-value targets. Bastion at (2,2) is shield-walling north toward (2,1). Prioritize trapping the Bastion corridor or cutting off Hawk's angle. Enemy trap at (3,2) — avoid.

Bastion is adjacent at (3,2) — Denial is already suppressing their abilities. Hawk is wounded at (3,1) within range 2. From (2,1), Snare is at dist=2, within precision_shot range, and I haven't moved more than needed so precision_shot fires at full 2dmg.
